tags.name: Aasiaat Nugguat
tags.validation_note: No site-specific sources found after deep QA. OSM-mapped rocky reef near Aasiaat in Disko Bay archipelago. Three independent sources required to re-validate.

tags.name: Maniitsup Ikkannersua, Maniitsup Ikkannera

tags.validation_note: No site-specific sources found after deep QA. OSM-mapped rocky bank (Sukkertoppen Banke) in waters off Maniitsoq, west Greenland. Three independent sources required to re-validate.

tags.name: Carl
tags.validation_note: Deep QA 2026-06-01: no independent source found confirming vessel name, build date, length, tonnage, or sinking cause. OSM-only record (way 1137623285, edited by 'andershl'). Cannot meet 2-source requirement for wreck history. Depth 40m is retained from OSM but unconfirmed. Validation status downgraded from true. Requires maritime archive research before re-validation.

tags.name: Nuugaatsiaap Ikkannera
tags.validation_note: Deep QA 2026-06-01: no site-specific sources found. Previous description incorrectly linked this site to the 2017 Nuugaatsiaq landslide-tsunami — Nuugaatsiaap Ikkannera (near Ilulissat, lat 68.1) and Nuugaatsiaq settlement (lat ~71.5, Karrat Fjord) are distinct places; tsunami claim removed as hallucination. Three independent sources required to re-validate.

tags.name: Qerruannguit
tags.validation_note: No site-specific sources found after deep QA. OSM-mapped rocky reef in Disko Bay region. Three independent sources required to re-validate.

tags.name: Ikkanneq
tags.validation_note: No site-specific sources found after deep QA. OSM-mapped rocky reef in Disko Bay area. Previous description attributed specific species (polar cod, nudibranchs, skeleton shrimp, scallops, bristle worms) without site-specific sourcing — replaced with regional-level description. Three independent sources required to re-validate.
